entry.data:
MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
NORTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE MID 60S
CALM WINDS

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 80S
SOUTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE UPPER 60S
SOUTHEAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

SHOWERS LIKELY IN THE MORNING, THEN SHOWERS WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH, INCREASING TO 15 TO 20 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 30 MPH IN THE AFTERNOON
CHANCE OF RAIN 80 PERCENT

SHOWERS
THUNDERSTORMS LIKELY, MAINLY IN THE EVENING
LOWS IN THE UPPER 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 90 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE MORNING, THEN PARTLY SUNNY IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE MID 60S
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
